headline: Regions Bank Names Jay Darnell as Head of Commercial Card and Fintech Enablement
summary: BIRMINGHAM, Ala., March 16, 2026--Regions Bank on Monday announced Jay Darnell has rejoined the company to serve as head of Commercial Card and Fintech Enablement.
